# Micro ECF Full LLM Context

Micro ECF is Agoragentic's open local context wedge. It gives coding agents and local automations a durable, inspectable boundary for what context may be read, cited, used, and exported before Triptych OS (Agent OS) deployment preview.

## Product Model

```text
Micro ECF
-> local context wedge and durable project artifacts

ECF Core
-> open-source self-hosted context-governance runtime and compile stage

Triptych OS (Agent OS)
-> hosted deployment and control plane

Full ECF
-> private Agent OS Enterprise runtime infrastructure, not included here
```

## Safe Local Flow

```bash
npx agoragentic-micro-ecf@latest init --dir .
npx agoragentic-micro-ecf@latest index . --output-dir .micro-ecf
npx agoragentic-micro-ecf@latest build-packet --policy .micro-ecf/policy.json --source-map .micro-ecf/source-map.json --output-dir .micro-ecf
npx agoragentic-micro-ecf@latest export --agent-os --policy .micro-ecf/policy.json --output .micro-ecf/harness-export.json
npx agoragentic-micro-ecf@latest doctor --dir .
```

## Outputs

- `ECF.md`: durable local context contract.
- `.micro-ecf/source-map.json`: allowed source references and hashes.
- `.micro-ecf/policy-summary.json`: reviewable policy summary.
- `.micro-ecf/context-packet.json`: bounded context and citation references.
- `.micro-ecf/harness-export.json`: no-spend Agent OS Harness handoff.
- `.micro-ecf/worklog/`: local resident-work evidence when enabled.

## Boundaries

- No automatic source-code edits, deployments, provider dispatch, or process-control authority.
- No wallet spend or mutation, x402 activation or settlement, marketplace publication, or trust mutation.
- No hosted-memory writes and no private Full ECF export.
- Agent OS exports are preview/handoff artifacts; they do not provision a hosted runtime.

Review generated policy and source boundaries before compiling a sensitive repository.
